name: thorbit-sdk-workspace
description: Public source workspace for the Thorbit Node SDK, Python SDK, CLI, cURL guide, and tool contracts

scripts.build: npm run build:sdk && npm run build:cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=thorbit-sdk && npm run build:sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace=thorbit-cli
scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:cli && npm run test:python
scripts.test:python: uv run --isolated --project packages/thorbit-sdk-python python -m unittest discover -s packages/thorbit-sdk-python/tests -p 'test_*.py'
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
